name: golang-github-go-quicktest-qt-dev
title: golang-github-go-quicktest-qt-dev
summary: quick helpers for testing Go applications (Go library)
description:
quick helpers for testing Go applications (Go library)
qt: quicker Go tests - Package qt provides a collection of Go helpers
for writing tests. It uses generics, so requires Go 1.18 at least.
.
For a complete API reference, see the package documentation:
https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/go-quicktest/qt
.
This package contains the Go development library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-go-quicktest-qt-dev because quick helpers for testing Go applications (Go library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-go-quicktest-qt-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-go-quicktest-qt-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-go-quicktest-qt-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
